title: Morphing Shape

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Morphing Shape
content: Create an animation where a square morphs into a circle and vice versa by continuously changing the corner radius and background color every second.

constraints: Create both HTML and JavaScript files
Only use HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Square and circle must fill the entire page

starterCode.html: index.html: Morphing Shape

gradingCriteria.description: Morphing animation is implemented every second
Square and circle fill the entire page
Background color changes randomly every second
